titleStmt.title: SII 17.694: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 694. (A.R. No. 638 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine of the Vālīśvara temple.
On palaeographical grounds the inscription may be assigned to the 13th century.

This inscription records the gift of 32 cows left in the hands of the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple, by Niṉṟaikuḷattūḻāṉ Tiruvaṉpeṟṟāṉ alias Niṉṟaiyūrnāṭṭu-vēḷāṉ, for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirukkārikarai-uḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ ciri Irācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu kuṉṟavattaṉak koṭṭattu niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭil Āḷuṭaiyār tirukkārikarai Uṭaiya(ṉā)ārkku niṉṟaikuḷattūḻāṉ tiruvaṉ peṟṟāṉ niṉṟaiyūr nāṭ
ṭuveḷāṉ Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku vaitta tirunaṉtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu muppattiraṇṭum Ikkoyilil civappirāmaṇar Āṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉum Aṉpaṉāyaka paṭṭaṉum Āḻkoṉṭap piḷḷaiyum Ivaṉ tampi kāripiḷḷaiyum Ippacu muppattira
ṇṭu tirunaṉtāviḷakku Upaiyamākak kaikkoṇṭu Iṉta tirunaṉtāviḷakku Oṉṟum cantirā tittavarai Erikka kaṭavom Ākac cammatittu kaikkoṇṭom Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 17.694 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
